title: chore(deps): update dependency enzyme-adapter-preact-pure to v2.2.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [enzyme-adapter-preact-pure](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure) | devDependencies | minor | [`2.1.0` -> `2.2.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/2.1.0/2.2.0) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure</summary>

### [`v2.2.0`](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​220---2019-11-10)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/compare/v2.1.0...v2.2.0)

-   Improve support for projects written in TypeScript by integrating with
    the `@types/enzyme` package [#​84](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure/pull/84).
    See the [Usage with TypeScript](https://togithub.com/preactjs/enzyme-adapter-preact-pure#usage-with-typescript) section in the README and example project in `examples/typescript`.

</details>

---
